nasb.text: A drought on her waters, and they will be dried up! For it is a land of idols, And they are mad over fearsome idols.

esv.text: A drought against her waters, that they may be dried up! For it is a land of images, and they are mad over idols.

cnv.text: 乾旱必攻擊它的河流， 它們必乾涸； 因為這是偶像的地， 人必因可怕的偶像迷失本性。

ccb.text: 旱灾必临到巴比伦， 使那里的河流干涸， 因为那里偶像遍地， 人们都沉迷于祭拜神像。
